rsgl 0.1.0

Example Gallery

Source: vignettes/example-gallery.Rmd
example-gallery.Rmd

A collection of SGL examples organized by plot type. Each example is a self-contained SGL statement you can copy and adapt. For a full syntax reference, see vignette("sgl-language-guide").

Scatterplots

Basic scatterplot 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y
  from cars
  using points
")

Colored by group 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y,
    cyl as color
  from cars
  using points
")

Sized by variable 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y,
    wt as size
  from cars
  using points
")

With regression line 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y
  from cars
  using (
    points
    layer
    regression line
  )
")

Jittered points 

set.seed(42)
dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    cyl_cat as x,
    mpg as y
  from (
    select mpg, cast(cyl as varchar) as cyl_cat
    from cars
  )
  using jittered points
")

Filtered with SQL subquery 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y,
    cyl as color
  from (
    select
      hp, mpg,
      cyl::varchar as cyl
    from cars
    where cyl = 4 or cyl = 6
  )
  using points
")

Bar charts

Counts per category 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    cut as x,
    count(*) as y
  from diamonds
  group by
    cut
  using bars
")

Stacked bars 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    cut as x,
    count(*) as y,
    color as color
  from diamonds
  group by
    cut, color
  using bars
")

Unstacked (dodged) bars 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    cut as x,
    count(*) as y,
    color as color
  from diamonds
  group by
    cut, color
  using unstacked bars
")

Histograms

Basic histogram 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    bin(mpg) as x,
    count(*) as y
  from cars
  group by
    bin(mpg)
  using bars
")

Stacked histogram by group 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    bin(mpg) as x,
    count(*) as y,
    cyl_cat as color
  from (
    select *, cast(cyl as varchar) as cyl_cat
    from cars
  )
  group by
    bin(mpg), cyl_cat
  using bars
")

Line plots

Single line 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    age as x,
    circumference as y
  from trees
  using line
")

Multiple lines with collect by 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    age as x,
    circumference as y
  from trees
  collect by
    Tree
  using lines
")

Regression lines by group 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y,
    cyl as color
  from (
    select hp, mpg, cyl::varchar as cyl
    from cars
  )
  using regression lines
")

Box plots

Basic box plot 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    cut as x,
    price as y
  from diamonds
  using boxes
")

Pie charts

A pie chart is a stacked bar chart in polar coordinates. Map a count to theta and a category to color:

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    count(*) as theta,
    cut as color
  from diamonds
  group by
    cut
  using bars
")

Faceted plots

Horizontal facets 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y
  from cars
  using points
  facet by
    cyl
")

Vertical facets 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y
  from cars
  using points
  facet by
    cyl vertically
")

Facet grid 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y
  from cars
  using points
  facet by
    cyl,
    am
")

Log-scaled plots 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y
  from cars
  using (
    points
    layer
    regression line
  )
  scale by
    log(x),
    log(y)
")

Multi-layer plots

Points and regression line 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y
  from cars
  using points

  layer

  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y
  from cars
  using regression line
")

Custom titles 

dbGetPlot(con, "
  visualize
    hp as x,
    mpg as y,
    cyl as color
  from cars
  using points
  title
    x as 'Horsepower',
    y as 'Miles Per Gallon',
    color as 'Cylinders'
")

On this page
